DJ

Oliver Newton is a 13-year-old DJ from Wigan, bringing high-energy sets and seamless mixes to birthday parties, school discos, and community events across the borough.

Oliver Newton · DJ
About

Music-first,
every event.

From first song to last dance, Oliver reads the room and keeps the floor moving — blending chart hits, throwbacks, and crowd requests into one continuous mix.

Available across Wigan and the surrounding areas, including Standish, Orrell, Winstanley, Whelley, Ince, and Shevington.
